data.title: hooks/lib/session-misc-functions.sh exceeds 1000-line SC (1135 lines)
data.description: session-misc-functions.sh is 1135 lines, violating the no-source-file->1000-lines SC from epic 0df8-1c8c. Pre-existing at start of epic; not in scope of any story. Split into focused utility files by domain (session, cleanup, environment).
